source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Calm English reading UI with high-legibility headings, tabular reading metrics, and Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese library, notes, citation, and research screens.
layout: Precise 8px reading grids, quiet sidebar navigation, article and citation cards, focused command search, reading dashboards, structured tables, soft feather texture, barn-wood separators, and restrained 8px cards.

prompts.label: Transparent barn owl face motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Barn Owl transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a barn owl face motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete bird-face subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A front-facing barn owl face with the iconic cream heart-shaped facial disk, focused dark eyes, warm gold and honey-brown feather rim, subtle speckled tawny crown and wing-edge hints, pale ivory beak, realistic soft feather texture, and a quiet field-barn natural character. The identity must clearly read as barn owl face, not great horned owl, snowy owl, hawk, mask, cartoon, or logo.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include the full heart face shape and feather rim without cropping. Symmetrical, calm, focused expression suitable for a reading and knowledge interface. Clean studio lighting that preserves feather detail. No cast shadow.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, lighting variation, or texture. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no body, no wings spread, no barn interior, no branch, no book, no glasses, no props, no text, no watermark, no extra animals, no illustrated mascot, no neon colors.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Barn Owl light-mode design-system board
Input image: use the visible transparent barn owl face motif as the primary visual reference for palette, texture, shape language, and identity.
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Barn Owl", derived from the visible barn owl face motif. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible focused reading system.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution 4K-class board, clean professional UI design-system presentation, quiet field-barn focused reading system mood. Use large legible labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Barn Owl, Barn Owl Face, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Reading Dashboard / Data, Forms, Table, Command / Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract colors and interaction language from the cream heart-shaped facial disk, ivory feather field, honey-gold rim feathers, warm tawny brown speckles, deep brown focused eyes, pale beak, and quiet field-barn neutral context. The board must read as barn owl face, not generic owl, hawk, mascot, or Halloween theme.
Typography: English focused reading UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Noto Sans JP, 日本語 UI, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値. Use calm bilingual reading, library, notes, research, and dashboard labels with tabular numbers.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/ghost/destructive buttons, hover/pressed/disabled/loading states, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, article cards, reading queue cards, citation cards, note panels, table rows, reading list, command search palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, empty/loading/error states, progress, stepper, date picker, filters, status chips, spacing scale, radius samples, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons, theme token swatches.
Style: focused reading system, precise 8px grid and 8px card radius, cream heart-face reading surfaces, gold primary actions, warm brown navigation and structure, tawny speckle badges, ivory highlights, field-barn neutral separators, subtle feather and barn-wood texture overlays, dense but quiet dashboards, polished shadcn/tweakcn component language. Include a small motif cutout reference on the board.
Constraints: no generic purple or blue gradients, no neon colors, no beige-only palette, no spooky owl theme, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Barn Owl", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Barn Owl dark-mode design-system board
Input images: use the visible transparent barn owl face motif and the visible light-mode board as continuity references.
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Barn Owl" / "Barn Owl Face". Translate the same focused reading system language into dark mode; do not invent a new unrelated theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution 4K-class board, clean professional shadcn/tweakcn design-system presentation, quiet field-barn focused reading system mood. Keep labels large and legible.
Required visible sections: Morphous Barn Owl, Barn Owl Face, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Reading Dashboard / Data, Forms, Table, Command / Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve cream heart-face foregrounds, ivory reading text, honey-gold primary actions, tawny brown speckle accents, deep brown eye-inspired ink, barn-wood panel borders, feather texture, field-barn neutral separators, reading queue, notes, citations, dashboards, command search, status chips, and an 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. The board must read as barn owl face, not generic owl, hawk, mascot, Halloween, or gaming UI.
Typography: English focused reading UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Noto Sans JP, 日本語 UI, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値. Use calm bilingual reading, library, notes, research, and dashboard labels with tabular numbers.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/tertiary/ghost/destructive buttons, hover/pressed/disabled/loading states, checkbox, radio, switch, input, select, textarea, tabs, badges, alerts, article cards, reading queue metrics, citation cards, note panels, reading table rows, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, sidebar navigation, command search palette, filters, empty/loading/error states, progress, stepper, date picker, texture samples, radius samples, spacing scale, shadow samples, token code snippets, icon set.
Visual details: deep umber and barn-shadow background, warm dark-brown panels, cream and ivory readable text, honey-gold active states, tawny chart highlights, field-sage success chips, subtle feather-down and aged barn-wood texture overlays, thin tawny separators, restrained contrast, crisp controls and dashboards. Include a small motif cutout reference on the board.
Constraints: no neon orange, no generic black-and-orange gaming UI, no pure-black flat background, no unrelated saturated colors, no purple or blue gradient dominance, no spooky owl theme, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Barn Owl", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.
